echoParts: lifted up the serpent in the wilderness
so must the Son of Man
verseText: And as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up, that whoever believes in him may have eternal life.
meaning: God told Moses to lift up a bronze snake so that people who had been bitten by a snake could look at it and live. It was a picture of how Jesus would be lifted up on the cross to save us from sin.
